[[Chief Navigator]] '''Peita Aabe''' was a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer and one of the few [[Human/Legends|Humans]] to serve on the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force]]. He served in [[Ac'siel]] under [[Assistant Syndic]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]].

==Biography==
On [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] first visit to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Csilla/Legends|Csilla]], Peita Aabe escorted him and his companions to a meeting with the [[Ruling Families/Legends|Four Families]]. While Aabe's deciding vote in the meeting did not grant the Skywalkers' request for free travel through Chiss Territory, he did suggest a compromise, offering access to the [[Expeditionary Library]] on Csilla as an invaluable resource in their search for [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]].

In order to ensure that the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] remained outside the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], Aabe ordered [[Ina'ganet'nuruodo|Ganet]] to kidnap and eliminate Soontir Fel's family, who were strong supporters for Csilla joining the Galactic Alliance. However, his plans were put to an end by [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Hess'irolia'nuruodo|Irolia]], and he was tried and imprisoned for his [[Treason/Legends|treason]].
